Safety Inquiries

On this page

✦ Mac ​


ⓘ You must properly extract, or the following files will not open and will appear broken.
Ensure that you have read and understood the following instructions before you begin downloading: How To Extract Guide

Password: star

Downloads are hosted on Google Drive and MediaFire to maintain this project in budget. To ensure a safe experience and avoid accidental clicks on misleading pop-up ads with MediaFire, we HIGHLY recommend using a trusted adblocker before clicking any links.

Looking for an older release? Check the archive.

Table Of Contents ​

✧ Software

✧ Adobe Plugins

✧ OFX Plugins

Browse through the video tutorials for guidance if needed. Most files will also include written instructions in the form of a txt/pdf file.

✧ Software ​

Interested in Adobe software? Consider MacKed. ​

With MacKed's Adobe Activation Tool, you'll be able to patch Adobe applications installed directly from Creative Clouds servers, giving you an unlimited selection of apps, faster updates, and a stronger since of security due to manual control.

The installers listed below are typically more convenient for beginners and quicker to complete, ideal for those only interested in a select few Adobe programs.

After Effects ​

After Effects 2026.0(M1+ only)

After Effects 2025.6(M1+ only)

After Effects 2024.4

After Effects 2023.5

After Effects 2022.6

After Effects 2021 (18.4.1)

After Effects 2020 (17.0.6)

Media Encoder ​

Media Encoder 2026.0(M1+ only)

Media Encoder 2025.6(M1+ only)

Media Encoder 2024.3

Media Encoder 2023.5

Media Encoder 2022.6

Media Encoder 2021 (15.4.1)

Media Encoder 2020 (14.9)

Premiere Pro ​

Premiere Pro 2026.0(M1+ only)

Premiere Pro 2025.5(M1+ only)

Premiere Pro 2024.0(M1+ only)

Speech To Text 2025.0(M1+ only)



Photoshop ​

Photoshop 2026 (v27.3)(M1+ only)

Photoshop 2025 26.11(M1+ only)

Photoshop 2024.0

Adobe Unsorted ​

Animate 2024 (24.0.2)

Illustrator 2026 (v30.1)(M1+ only)

InDesign 2026 (v21.2)(M1+ only)

Lightroom Classic v15.1.1(M1+ only)



BlackMagic Design ​

DaVinci Resolve Studio 20.3.1

Topaz Labs ​

The following activators support the latest versions.Topaz Video

Topaz Photo

Topaz Gigapixel

TouchDesigner ​

TouchDesigner 2023(M1+ only)



Unsorted ​

Cinema 4D 2024

Blender

Handbrake

✧ Adobe Plugins ​

The following plugins are compatible with After Effects, with select plugins also supporting Premiere Pro when officially supported by the developer.

BorisFX ​

Continuum (BCC) 2026.0.1

Sapphire 2026.0

Mocha Pro 2026.0

Maxon ​

Red Giant 2026.3.0Includes Magic Bullet Suite, Trapcode Suite, VFX Suite and Universe.

RE:VisionFX ​

RE:VisionFX Bundle 24.03Includes all plugins by RE:VisionFX (full list here), including RSMB 6.4.4 & Twixtor 8.0.5 and it's Pro versions.

RE:VisionFX Bundle 23.03Includes all plugins by RE:VisionFX (full list here), including RSMB 6.4.1 & Twixtor 7.5.5 and it's Pro versions.

Video Copilot ​

Element 3D 2.2.3

Pro Shaders 1

Pro Shaders 2

Heat Distortion 1.0.32

Optical Flares 1.3.8

Saber

Twitch(Not M1+ supported.Rosetta required)

VC Color Vibrance

Autokroma ​

AfterCodecs 1.11.6(AE 2026 not supported)

Influx 1.5.5

PlumePack 2.3.3

BRAW Studio 3.3.3

Zaebects ​

JPEG Glitch 1.0.4

Modulation 2

Physarum v1.3

Signal

Cartoon Moblur 1.6.3

Extrude

Shadow Studio 3 1.0.7

TextDelay 1.7.5

Quick Chromatic Aberration

Glitchify

Polytrace

Aura 1.2.5

FastBokeh 2.0.8
